src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/a.general_idea: Move complex setup logic (npmrc path handling, profile creation, configuration building) from the API layer to the ConfigurationService.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/a.general_idea: Update the configuration model class name to reflect a new naming convention.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/a.general_idea: Ensure the output message ends with a newline character for correct console display.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/m.general_idea: Implement Serializable interface to enable object serialization capabilities.
Add Spring AOT reflective annotation to support native image generation.
Remove Lombok Jacksonized annotation in favor of explicit Spring AOT hints.
Add 'active' boolean field to the record to track profile status.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Rename the configuration model class from Configuration to NpmrcmConfiguration to improve namespace clarity.
Add Lombok's @NonNull annotation to the save method parameter to enforce null checks.
Introduce a new setup method to the service interface for initialization logic.
Remove getConfigLocation and getProfilesLocation methods as they are no longer part of the public interface.
Delegate filesystem operations to a dedicated FilesystemHelper service to reduce boilerplate and improve testability.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Replaced direct usage of java.nio.file.Files and java.io.File with calls to filesystemHelper.read(), filesystemHelper.write(), etc.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Rename the configuration model class from Configuration to NpmrcmConfiguration for better namespace clarity.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Changed import and usage from com.cps.cli.npmrcmanager.model.Configuration to com.cps.cli.npmrcmanager.model.NpmrcmConfiguration.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Implement the setup method to initialize the application configuration by prompting the user for the npmrc path.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Added setup() method that uses userInputService to get path and npmrcService to create initial profile.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Inject additional services (UserInputService, NpmrcService) to support the new setup logic and decouple concerns.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Added @NonNull private final UserInputService userInputService; and @NonNull private final NpmrcService npmrcService; fields.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Improve error messages and handling in load() to provide actionable suggestions to the user when config is missing.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Updated IllegalStateException message to include 'SUGGESTION: Set it up by running "npmrcm setup"' and used String.format.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Use Optional to handle potentially missing npmrc file contents gracefully during profile loading.
src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.human_impl: Wrapped npmrc file reading in try-catch returning Optional<String> instead of throwing RuntimeException immediately.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Replace stream-based file iteration with a standard for-loop for clearer control flow when processing profiles.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Standardize string formatting using String.format instead of concatenation for better readability.
